title: epipactis subregularis
intro: Epipactis subregularis, also known as the autumn lady's tresses, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood sugar levels and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Epipactis subregularis include its potential to aid in the management of diabetes, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce oxidative stress. Epipactis subregularis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine in various forms, including powders and extracts.
